mapper.sql: select r.relation_id, r.project_id, r.source_id, r.target_id, r.relation_type, r.weight, r.evidence, r.chapter_id, r.create_by, r.create_time, s.name as source_name, t.name as target_name from novel_meta_relation r left join novel_meta_entity s on r.source_id = s.entity_id left join novel_meta_entity t on r.target_id = t.entity_id
mapper.delete: delete from novel_meta_relation where relation_id in #{relationId}
